kpis.title: Growth %
kpis.description: Relative growth from first to last monthly bucket.

charts.title: revenue Over Time
charts.sql: SELECT date_trunc('day', "order_date")::DATE AS x, SUM("revenue") AS y FROM "dataset_c5a8fc75_a261_4e5e_acdb_53ee0f5ca099" WHERE "order_date" IS NOT NULL AND "revenue" IS NOT NULL {{filters}} GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1 LIMIT 365

charts.title: Top region
charts.sql: SELECT "region" AS x, SUM("revenue") AS y FROM "dataset_c5a8fc75_a261_4e5e_acdb_53ee0f5ca099" WHERE "region" IS NOT NULL {{filters}} GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY y DESC LIMIT 12

insights.title: Trend
